/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, or entity responds to this path, and no disabled view declares it.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed. The core Moderated content view lives at /admin/content/moderated, not here; no view or route declares the literal /moderated-content.

/blog.reason: Already the canonical alias of canvas_page 2 ("Blog", alias of /page/2). A second surface here would conflict immediately.

/search.reason: Owned by the enabled Views page display search:page (route view.search.page). A node alias here would shadow and hijack the search view.

/admin/content/files.reason: Latent conflict: the disabled view files:page_1 declares this exact path. Enabling that view (routine config change) would collide with the node.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: Latent conflict: the disabled view scheduler_scheduled_media:overview declares this exact path. Enabling that view would collide with the node.
